\\\\\\\"$W/src/agentic/VoiceBrain.ts\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\n// VoiceBrain.ts - Central Voice Intelligence\\\\nexport type AudioState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\nexport type VoiceMode = 'interactive' | 'talkative' | 'text';\\\\n\\\\nconst WORD_TO_DIGIT: Record<string, string> = {\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\n  'five': '5',\\\\n  'six': '6',\\\\n  'seven': '7',\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\n};\\\\n\\\\nexport const extractDigits = (text: string): string => {\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\n  for (const word of words) {\\\\n    if (WORD_TO_DIGIT[word]) {\\\\n      digits += WORD_TO_DIGIT[word];\\\\n    } else if (/^\\\\\\\\d$/.test(word)) {\\\\n      digits += word;\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n  return digits || text.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\n};\\\\n\\\\nexport const formatPhone = (digits: string): string => {\\\\n  const d = digits.slice(0, 10);\\\\n  if (d.length <= 3) return d;\\\\n  if (d.length <= 6) return `${d.slice(0, 3)}-${d.slice(3)}`;\\\\n  return `${d.slice(0, 3)}-${d.slice(3, 6)}-${d.slice(6)}`;\\\\n};\\\\n\\\\ninterface BrainState {\\\\n  audioState: AudioState;\\\\n  mode: VoiceMode;\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\n  context: string;\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\nclass VoiceBrainClass {\\\\n  private static instance: VoiceBrainClass;\\\\n  private recognition: SpeechRecognition | null = null;\\\\n  private synth: SpeechSynthesis | null = null;\\\\n  \\\\n  private state: BrainState = {\\\\n    audioState: 'IDLE',\\\\n    mode: 'interactive',\\\\n    transcript: '',\\\\n    context: '',\\\\n    error: null\\\\n  };\\\\n  \\\\n  private listeners = new Set<(state: BrainState) => void>();\\\\n  private digitHandlers = new Set<(digits: string) => void>();\\\\n  private commandHandlers = new Set<(cmd: string) => void>();\\\\n  private shouldRestart = true;\\\\n  private initialized = false;\\\\n\\\\n  static getInstance(): VoiceBrainClass {\\\\n    if (!VoiceBrainClass.instance) {\\\\n      VoiceBrainClass.instance = new VoiceBrainClass();\\\\n    }\\\\n    return VoiceBrainClass.instance;\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  init(): boolean {\\\\n    if (this.initialized) return true;\\\\n    \\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\n      this.updateState({ error: 'Speech not supported. Use Chrome.' });\\\\n      return false;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    this.synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\n    this.recognition = new SR();\\\\n    this.recognition.continuous = true;\\\\n    this.recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\n    this.recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\n\\\\n    this.recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Listening...');\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'LISTENING', error: null });\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    this.recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\n      \\\\n      if (result.isFinal && text) {\\\\n        console.log('[VoiceBrain] Heard:', text);\\\\n        this.updateState({ transcript: text });\\\\n        this.processText(text.toLowerCase());\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    this.recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\n        this.updateState({ error: 'Microphone blocked. Allow in browser settings.', audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    this.recognition.onend = () => {\\\\n      if (this.shouldRestart && this.state.audioState !== 'SPEAKING' && this.state.audioState !== 'PAUSED') {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\n          if (this.shouldRestart && this.recognition) {\\\\n            try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n          }\\\\n        }, 100);\\\\n      } else if (this.state.audioState !== 'SPEAKING' && this.state.audioState !== 'PAUSED') {\\\\n        this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    this.initialized = true;\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Initialized');\\\\n    return true;\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  private updateState(partial: Partial<BrainState>): void {\\\\n    this.state = { ...this.state, ...partial };\\\\n    this.listeners.forEach(l => l(this.state));\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  private processText(text: string): void {\\\\n    // Pause commands\\\\n    if (text.includes('hey') || text === 'stop' || text === 'pause') {\\\\n      this.pause();\\\\n      this.speak(\\\\\\\"I'm here when you need me. Say resume to continue.\\\\\\\");\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // Resume\\\\n    if (text === 'resume' || text === 'continue') {\\\\n      this.resume();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // Extract digits\\\\n    const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\n    if (digits) {\\\\n      this.digitHandlers.forEach(h => h(digits));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // Send to command handlers\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.forEach(h => h(text));\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  getState(): BrainState {\\\\n    return { ...this.state };\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  subscribe(listener: (state: BrainState) => void): () => void {\\\\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\\\\n    listener(this.state);\\\\n    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  onDigits(handler: (digits: string) => void): () => void {\\\\n    this.digitHandlers.add(handler);\\\\n    return () => this.digitHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  onCommand(handler: (cmd: string) => void): () => void {\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.add(handler);\\\\n    return () => this.commandHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  setContext(context: string): void {\\\\n    this.updateState({ context });\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  setMode(mode: VoiceMode): void {\\\\n    this.updateState({ mode });\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  start(): void {\\\\n    if (!this.init()) return;\\\\n    if (this.state.audioState === 'SPEAKING') return;\\\\n    \\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  stop(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  pause(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'PAUSED' });\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  resume(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.speak(\\\\\\\"I'm listening.\\\\\\\");\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  speak(text: string, onDone?: () => void): void {\\\\n    if (!text || this.state.mode === 'text') {\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (!this.init() || !this.synth) {\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // Stop listening while speaking (Audio Mutex)\\\\n    const wasListening = this.shouldRestart;\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    this.synth.cancel();\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'SPEAKING' });\\\\n\\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1;\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1;\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1;\\\\n\\\\n    const voices = this.synth.getVoices();\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US'));\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\n\\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    utterance.onerror = () => {\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n\\\\n    setTimeout(() => this.synth?.speak(utterance), 50);\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\nexport const voiceBrain = VoiceBrainClass.getInstance();\\\\nexport default voiceBrain;\\\\nENDFILE\\\\n\\\\necho \\\\\\\"  \\\\u2705 VoiceBrain.ts\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n# --- AgenticBar.tsx ---\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\"$W/src/agentic/AgenticBar.tsx\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\n// AgenticBar.tsx - Voice Control UI Component\\\\nimport React, { useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\nimport { voiceBrain, extractDigits, formatPhone, AudioState, VoiceMode } from './VoiceBrain';\\\\n\\\\nexport { extractDigits, formatPhone };\\\\n\\\\n// Global functions\\\\nexport const speak = (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceBrain.speak(text, onDone);\\\\nexport const onDigits = (handler: (d: string) => void) => voiceBrain.onDigits(handler);\\\\nexport const onCommand = (handler: (c: string) => void) => voiceBrain.onCommand(handler);\\\\nexport const startListening = () => voiceBrain.start();\\\\nexport const stopListening = () => voiceBrain.stop();\\\\nexport const setContext = (ctx: string) => voiceBrain.setContext(ctx);\\\\nexport const setMode = (mode: VoiceMode) => voiceBrain.setMode(mode);\\\\n\\\\n// Hook\\\\nexport function useVoice() {\\\\n  const [, forceUpdate] = useState(0);\\\\n  \\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    voiceBrain.init();\\\\n    return voiceBrain.subscribe(() => forceUpdate(x => x + 1));\\\\n  }, []);\\\\n\\\\n  const state = voiceBrain.getState();\\\\n  return {\\\\n    ...state,\\\\n    isListening: state.audioState === 'LISTENING',\\\\n    isSpeaking: state.audioState === 'SPEAKING',\\\\n    isPaused: state.audioState === 'PAUSED',\\\\n    start: () => voiceBrain.start(),\\\\n    stop: () => voiceBrain.stop(),\\\\n    pause: () => voiceBrain.pause(),\\\\n    resume: () => voiceBrain.resume(),\\\\n    speak: (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceBrain.speak(text, onDone),\\\\n    setMode: (mode: VoiceMode) => voiceBrain.setMode(mode),\\\\n    setContext: (ctx: string) => voiceBrain.setContext(ctx)\\\\n  };\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// Props\\\\ninterface AgenticBarProps {\\\\n  context?: string;\\\\n  hints?: string[];\\\\n  welcomeMessage?: string;\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\n  showTypeInput?: boolean;\\\\n  onDigits?: (d: string) => void;\\\\n  onCommand?: (c: string) => void;\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// Component\\\\nconst AgenticBar: React.FC<AgenticBarProps> = ({\\\\n  context,\\\\n  hints,\\\\n  welcomeMessage,\\\\n  autoStart = true,\\\\n  showTypeInput = true,\\\\n  onDigits: onDigitsProp,\\\\n  onCommand: onCommandProp\\\\n}) => {\\\\n  const voice = useVoice();\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\n voiceBrain.onDigits(onDigitsProp);\\\\n  }, [onDigitsProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (onCommandProp) return voiceBrain.onCommand(onCommandProp);\\\\n  }, [onCommandProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (context) voiceBrain.setContext(context);\\\\n  }, [context]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Welcome message\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\n      if (welcomeMessage) {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\n          voiceBrain.speak(welcomeMessage, () => {\\\\n            if (autoStart) voiceBrain.start();\\\\n          });\\\\n        }, 600);\\\\n      } else if (autoStart) {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => voiceBrain.start(), 500);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [welcomeMessage, autoStart]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleTextSubmit = useCallback(() => {\\\\n    if (textInput.trim()) {\\\\n      const digits = extractDigits(textInput);\\\\n      if (digits && onDigitsProp) onDigitsProp(digits);\\\\n      if (onCommandProp) onCommandProp(textInput.toLowerCase());\\\\n      setTextInput('');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [textInput, onDigitsProp, onCommandProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Colors\\\\n  const statusColor = voice.isSpeaking ? \\\\\\\"$W/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorPhone.tsx\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\nimport AgenticBar, { speak, onDigits, onCommand, React.FC<Props> = ({ value, onChange, onNext }) => {\\\\n  const [digits, setDigits] = useState(value.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, ''));\\\\n\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((d: string) => {\\\\n    setDigits(prev => {\\\\n      const next = (prev + d).slice(0, 10);\\\\n      onChange(next);\\\\n      if (next.length === 10) {\\\\n        speak(`Got it! ${formatPhone(next)}. Say yes to confirm, or clear to start over.`);\\\\n      } else if (d) {\\\\n        speak(`${10 - next.length} more digits.`);\\\\n      }\\\\n      return next;\\\\n    });\\\\n  }, [onChange]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('yes') || cmd.includes('confirm') || cmd.includes('send')) && digits.length >= 10) {\\\\n      speak('Sending verification code.', () => onNext());\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\n      setDigits('');\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\n      speak('Cleared. Tell me your number again.');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [digits, onChange, onNext]);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    const u1 = onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\n    const u2 = onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\n    return () => { u1(); u2(); };\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    const clean = value.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\n    if (clean !== digits) setDigits(clean);\\\\n  }, [value]);\\\\n\\\\n  const canSubmit = digits.length >= 10;\\\\n\\\\n  return (\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\ud83d\\\\udcf1</span>\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\n        Enter Your Phone Number\\\\n      </h3>\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\n        Say digits like \\\\\\\"seven zero three\\\\\\\" or type below\\\\n      </p>\\\\n\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\n        <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '1.5em' }}>+1</span>\\\\n        <input\\\\n          type=\\\\\\\"tel\\\\\\\"\\\\n          value={formatPhone(digits)}\\\\n          onChange={e => {\\\\n            const clean = e.target.value.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\n            setDigits(clean);\\\\n            onChange(clean);\\\\n          }}\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\"000-000-0000\\\\\\\"\\\\n          style={{\\\\n            fontSize: '2em',\\\\n            padding: '18px 28px',\\\\n            borderRadius: '14px',\\\\n            border: `3px solid ${canSubmit ? Welcome aboard.', () => onVerified());\\\\n    } else {\\\\n      setError('Invalid code. Demo code is 123456');\\\\n      speak('Invalid code. For demo, say one two three four five six.');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [onVerified]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\\\\n    setOtp(prev => {\\\\n      const filled = prev.filter(d => d).length;\\\\n      const next = [...prev];\\\\n      let idx = filled;\\\\n\\\\n      for (const d of digits) {\\\\n        if (idx < 6) {\\\\n          next[idx] = d;\\\\n          idx++;\\\\n        }\\\\n      }\\\\n\\\\n      if (next.filter(d => d).length === 6) {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => verifyCode(next.join('')), 300);\\\\n      }\\\\n\\\\n      return next;\\\\n    });\\\\n  }, [verifyCode]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\n      setOtp(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\n      setError('');\\\\n      speak('Cleared. Enter the code again.');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, []);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    const u1 = onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\n    const u2 = onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\n    return () => { u1(); u2(); };\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleInput = (index: number, value: string) => {\\\\n    if (!/^\\\\\\\\d*$/.test(value)) return;\\\\n    const next = [...otp];\\\\n    next[index] = value.slice(-1);\\\\n    setOtp(next);\\\\n    if (value && index < 5) inputRefs.current[index + 1]?.focus();\\\\n    if (next.every(d => d)) verifyCode(next.join(''));\\\\n  };\\\\n\\\\n  return (\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\ud83d\\\\udd10</span>\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\n        Verification Code\\\\n      </h3>\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\n        Code sent to {phone}\\\\n      </p>\\\\n\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\\\\n        {otp.map((digit, idx) => (\\\\n          <input\\\\n            key={idx}\\\\n            ref={el => inputRefs.current[idx] = el}\\\\n            type=\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\"\\\\n            inputMode=\\\\\\\"numeric\\\\\\\"\\\\n            maxLength={1}\\\\n            value={digit}\\\\n            onChange={e => handleInput(idx, e.target.value)}\\\\n            style={{\\\\n              width: '55px',\\\\n              height: '68px',\\\\n              fontSize: '2em',\\\\n              textAlign: 'center',\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n              border: `3px solid ${digit ? Your profile looks professional. Say save when ready.');\\\\n    }, 2000);\\\\n  }, [profile, companyName, onBeautify]);\\\\n\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('beautify') || cmd.includes('enhance')) {\\\\n      doBeautify();\\\\n    }\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('save') || cmd.includes('next')) && companyName.trim()) {\\\\n      speak('Saving your profile.', () => onSave());\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\n      onBeautify('');\\\\n      setShowBeautified(false);\\\\n      speak('Profile cleared.');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [doBeautify, companyName, onSave, onChange, onBeautify]);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    return onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\n  }, [handleCommand]);\\\\n\\\\n  const displayText = showBeautified && beautified ? beautified : profile;\\\\n\\\\n  return (\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '3.5em' }}>\\\\ud83c\\\\udfea</span>\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\n        Business Profile\\\\n      </h3>\\\\n\\\\n      <div style={{ maxWidth: '540px', margin: '0 auto' }}>\\\\n        <input\\\\n          type=\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\"\\\\n          value={companyName}\\\\n          onChange={e => onCompanyChange(e.target.value)}\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\"Company Name\\\\\\\"\\\\n          style={{\\\\n            width: '100%',\\\\n            padding: '16px 20px',\\\\n            marginBottom: '16px',\\\\n            borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n            border: `2px solid ${companyName ? VoiceBrain.ts ---\\\\\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$W/src/agentic/VoiceBrain.ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\\\\\n// VoiceBrain.ts - Central Voice Intelligence\\\\\\\\nexport type AudioState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\nexport type VoiceMode = 'interactive' | 'talkative' | 'text';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst WORD_TO_DIGIT: Record<string, string> = {\\\\\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\\\\\n  'five': '5',\\\\\\\\n  'six': '6',\\\\\\\\n  'seven': '7',\\\\\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const extractDigits = (text: string): string => {\\\\\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\\\\\n  for (const word of words) {\\\\\\\\n    if (WORD_TO_DIGIT[word]) {\\\\\\\\n      digits += WORD_TO_DIGIT[word];\\\\\\\\n    } else if (/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d$/.test(word)) {\\\\\\\\n      digits += word;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return digits || text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const formatPhone = (digits: string): string => {\\\\\\\\n  const d = digits.slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n  if (d.length <= 3) return d;\\\\\\\\n  if (d.length <= 6) return `${d.slice(0, 3)}-${d.slice(3)}`;\\\\\\\\n  return `${d.slice(0, 3)}-${d.slice(3, 6)}-${d.slice(6)}`;\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface BrainState {\\\\\\\\n  audioState: AudioState;\\\\\\\\n  mode: VoiceMode;\\\\\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\\\\\n  context: string;\\\\\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass VoiceBrainClass {\\\\\\\\n  private static instance: VoiceBrainClass;\\\\\\\\n  private recognition: SpeechRecognition | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private synth: SpeechSynthesis | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private state: BrainState = {\\\\\\\\n    audioState: 'IDLE',\\\\\\\\n    mode: 'interactive',\\\\\\\\n    transcript: '',\\\\\\\\n    context: '',\\\\\\\\n    error: null\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private listeners = new Set<(state: BrainState) => void>();\\\\\\\\n  private digitHandlers = new Set<(digits: string) => void>();\\\\\\\\n  private commandHandlers = new Set<(cmd: string) => void>();\\\\\\\\n  private shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n  private initialized = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  static getInstance(): VoiceBrainClass {\\\\\\\\n    if (!VoiceBrainClass.instance) {\\\\\\\\n      VoiceBrainClass.instance = new VoiceBrainClass();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return VoiceBrainClass.instance;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  init(): boolean {\\\\\\\\n    if (this.initialized) return true;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ error: 'Speech not supported. Use Chrome.' });\\\\\\\\n      return false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition = new SR();\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.continuous = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Listening...');\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'LISTENING', error: null });\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (result.isFinal && text) {\\\\\\\\n        console.log('[VoiceBrain] Heard:', text);\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ transcript: text });\\\\\\\\n        this.processText(text.toLowerCase());\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ error: 'Microphone blocked. Allow in browser settings.', audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      if (this.shouldRestart && this.state.audioState !== 'SPEAKING' && this.state.audioState !== 'PAUSED') {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n          if (this.shouldRestart && this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n            try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }, 100);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (this.state.audioState !== 'SPEAKING' && this.state.audioState !== 'PAUSED') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.initialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Initialized');\\\\\\\\n    return true;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  private updateState(partial: Partial<BrainState>): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.state = { ...this.state, ...partial };\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.forEach(l => l(this.state));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  private processText(text: string): void {\\\\\\\\n    // Pause commands\\\\\\\\n    if (text.includes('hey') || text === 'stop' || text === 'pause') {\\\\\\\\n      this.pause();\\\\\\\\n      this.speak(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"I'm here when you need me. Say resume to continue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Resume\\\\\\\\n    if (text === 'resume' || text === 'continue') {\\\\\\\\n      this.resume();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Extract digits\\\\\\\\n    const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\\\\\n    if (digits) {\\\\\\\\n      this.digitHandlers.forEach(h => h(digits));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Send to command handlers\\\\\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.forEach(h => h(text));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  getState(): BrainState {\\\\\\\\n    return { ...this.state };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  subscribe(listener: (state: BrainState) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\\\\\\\\n    listener(this.state);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  onDigits(handler: (digits: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.digitHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.digitHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  onCommand(handler: (cmd: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.commandHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  setContext(context: string): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ context });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  setMode(mode: VoiceMode): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ mode });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  start(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.init()) return;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.state.audioState === 'SPEAKING') return;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  stop(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  pause(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'PAUSED' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  resume(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.speak(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"I'm listening.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  speak(text: string, onDone?: () => void): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!text || this.state.mode === 'text') {\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.init() || !this.synth) {\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Stop listening while speaking (Audio Mutex)\\\\\\\\n    const wasListening = this.shouldRestart;\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.synth.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'SPEAKING' });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const voices = this.synth.getVoices();\\\\\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US'));\\\\\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    utterance.onerror = () => {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    setTimeout(() => this.synth?.speak(utterance), 50);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const voiceBrain = VoiceBrainClass.getInstance();\\\\\\\\nexport default voiceBrain;\\\\\\\\nENDFILE\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  \\\\\\\\u2705 VoiceBrain.ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- AgenticBar.tsx ---\\\\\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$W/src/agentic/AgenticBar.tsx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\\\\\n// AgenticBar.tsx - Voice Control UI Component\\\\\\\\nimport React, { useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { voiceBrain, extractDigits, formatPhone, AudioState, VoiceMode } from './VoiceBrain';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { extractDigits, formatPhone };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Global functions\\\\\\\\nexport const speak = (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceBrain.speak(text, onDone);\\\\\\\\nexport const onDigits = (handler: (d: string) => void) => voiceBrain.onDigits(handler);\\\\\\\\nexport const onCommand = (handler: (c: string) => void) => voiceBrain.onCommand(handler);\\\\\\\\nexport const startListening = () => voiceBrain.start();\\\\\\\\nexport const stopListening = () => voiceBrain.stop();\\\\\\\\nexport const setContext = (ctx: string) => voiceBrain.setContext(ctx);\\\\\\\\nexport const setMode = (mode: VoiceMode) => voiceBrain.setMode(mode);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Hook\\\\\\\\nexport function useVoice() {\\\\\\\\n  const [, forceUpdate] = useState(0);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    voiceBrain.init();\\\\\\\\n    return voiceBrain.subscribe(() => forceUpdate(x => x + 1));\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const state = voiceBrain.getState();\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    ...state,\\\\\\\\n    isListening: state.audioState === 'LISTENING',\\\\\\\\n    isSpeaking: state.audioState === 'SPEAKING',\\\\\\\\n    isPaused: state.audioState === 'PAUSED',\\\\\\\\n    start: () => voiceBrain.start(),\\\\\\\\n    stop: () => voiceBrain.stop(),\\\\\\\\n    pause: () => voiceBrain.pause(),\\\\\\\\n    resume: () => voiceBrain.resume(),\\\\\\\\n    speak: (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceBrain.speak(text, onDone),\\\\\\\\n    setMode: (mode: VoiceMode) => voiceBrain.setMode(mode),\\\\\\\\n    setContext: (ctx: string) => voiceBrain.setContext(ctx)\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Props\\\\\\\\ninterface AgenticBarProps {\\\\\\\\n  context?: string;\\\\\\\\n  hints?: string[];\\\\\\\\n  welcomeMessage?: string;\\\\\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  showTypeInput?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  onDigits?: (d: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onCommand?: (c: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Component\\\\\\\\nconst AgenticBar: React.FC<AgenticBarProps> = ({\\\\\\\\n  context,\\\\\\\\n  hints,\\\\\\\\n  welcomeMessage,\\\\\\\\n  autoStart = true,\\\\\\\\n  showTypeInput = true,\\\\\\\\n  onDigits: onDigitsProp,\\\\\\\\n  onCommand: onCommandProp\\\\\\\\n}) => {\\\\\\\\n  const voice = useVoice();\\\\\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [textInput, setTextInput] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const [showModes, setShowModes] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Register handlers\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onDigitsProp) return voiceBrain.onDigits(onDigitsProp);\\\\\\\\n  }, [onDigitsProp]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onCommandProp) return voiceBrain.onCommand(onCommandProp);\\\\\\\\n  }, [onCommandProp]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (context) voiceBrain.setContext(context);\\\\\\\\n  }, [context]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Welcome message\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      if (welcomeMessage) {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n          voiceBrain.speak(welcomeMessage, () => {\\\\\\\\n            if (autoStart) voiceBrain.start();\\\\\\\\n          });\\\\\\\\n        }, 600);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (autoStart) {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => voiceBrain.start(), 500);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [welcomeMessage, autoStart]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleTextSubmit = useCallback(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (textInput.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      const digits = '\\\\\\\\u23f8\\\\\\\\ufe0f' : '\\\\\\\\u25a0';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{\\\\\\\\n      margin: '16px 0 0',\\\\\\\\n      padding: '16px',\\\\\\\\n      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(${voice.isListening ? << 'ENDFILE'\\\\\\\\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport AgenticBar, { speak, onDigits, onCommand, formatPhone } from '../../../agentic';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Props {\\\\\\\\n  value: string;\\\\\\\\n  onChange: (phone: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onNext: () => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst VendorPhone: React.FC<Props> = ({ value, onChange, onNext }) => {\\\\\\\\n  const [digits, setDigits] = useState(value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, ''));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((d: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    setDigits(prev => {\\\\\\\\n      const next = (prev + d).slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n      onChange(next);\\\\\\\\n      if (next.length === 10) {\\\\\\\\n        speak(`Got it! ${formatPhone(next)}. Say yes to confirm, or clear to start over.`);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (d) {\\\\\\\\n        speak(`${10 - next.length} more digits.`);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return next;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, [onChange]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('yes') || cmd.includes('confirm') || cmd.includes('send')) && digits.length >= 10) {\\\\\\\\n      speak('Sending verification code.', () => onNext());\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      setDigits('');\\\\\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\\\\\n      speak('Cleared. Tell me your number again.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [digits, onChange, onNext]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const u1 = onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\\\\\n    const u2 = onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n    return () => { u1(); u2(); };\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const clean = value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    if (clean !== digits) setDigits(clean);\\\\\\\\n  }, [value]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const canSubmit = digits.length >= 10;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udcf1</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Enter Your Phone Number\\\\\\\\n      </h3>\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Say digits like \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"seven zero three\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or type below\\\\\\\\n      </p>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '1.5em' }}>+1</span>\\\\\\\\n        <input\\\\\\\\n          type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          value={formatPhone(digits)}\\\\\\\\n          onChange={e => {\\\\\\\\n            const clean = e.target.value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n            setDigits(clean);\\\\\\\\n            onChange(clean);\\\\\\\\n          }}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"000-000-0000\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          style={{\\\\\\\\n            fontSize: '2em',\\\\\\\\n            padding: '18px 28px',\\\\\\\\n            borderRadius: '14px',\\\\\\\\n            border: `3px solid ${canSubmit ? '#4CAF50' : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.4)'}`,\\\\\\\\n            background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\\\\\\\\n            color: '#fff',\\\\\\\\n            textAlign: 'center',\\\\\\\\n            width: '300px',\\\\\\\\n            fontFamily: 'monospace',\\\\\\\\n            letterSpacing: '3px'\\\\\\\\n          }}\\\\\\\\n        />\\\\\\\\n        {digits && (\\\\\\\\n          <button\\\\\\\\n            onClick={() => { setDigits(''); onChange(''); speak('Cleared.'); }}\\\\\\\\n            style={{\\\\\\\\n              background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\\\\\n              border: 'none',\\\\\\\\n              color: '#888',\\\\\\\\n              width: '44px',\\\\\\\\n              height: '44px',\\\\\\\\n              borderRadius: '50%',\\\\\\\\n              cursor: 'pointer',\\\\\\\\n              fontSize: '1.3em'\\\\\\\\n            }}\\\\\\\\n          >\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\u2715\\\\\\\\n          </button>\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n      </div>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      {canSubmit && (\\\\\\\\n        <p style={{ color: '#4CAF50', marginBottom: '16px', fontWeight: 500 }}>\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2713 Phone complete! Welcome aboard.', () => onVerified());\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      setError('Invalid code. Demo code is 123456');\\\\\\\\n      speak('Invalid code. For demo, say one two three four five six.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onVerified]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(prev => {\\\\\\\\n      const filled = prev.filter(d => d).length;\\\\\\\\n      const next = [...prev];\\\\\\\\n      let idx = filled;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      for (const d of digits) {\\\\\\\\n        if (idx < 6) {\\\\\\\\n          next[idx] = d;\\\\\\\\n          idx++;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (next.filter(d => d).length === 6) {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => verifyCode(next.join('')), 300);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return next;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, [verifyCode]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      setOtp(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\\\\\n      setError('');\\\\\\\\n      speak('Cleared. Enter the code again.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const u1 = onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\\\\\n    const u2 = onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n    return () => { u1(); u2(); };\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleInput = (index: number, value: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d*$/.test(value)) return;\\\\\\\\n    const next = [...otp];\\\\\\\\n    next[index] = value.slice(-1);\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(next);\\\\\\\\n    if (value && index < 5) inputRefs.current[index + 1]?.focus();\\\\\\\\n    if (next.every(d => d)) verifyCode(next.join(''));\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd10</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Verification Code\\\\\\\\n      </h3>\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Code sent to {phone}\\\\\\\\n      </p>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        {otp.map((digit, idx) => (\\\\\\\\n          <input\\\\\\\\n            key={idx}\\\\\\\\n            ref={el => inputRefs.current[idx] = el}\\\\\\\\n            type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            inputMode=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"numeric\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            maxLength={1}\\\\\\\\n            value={digit}\\\\\\\\n            onChange={e => handleInput(idx, e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n            style={{\\\\\\\\n              width: '55px',\\\\\\\\n              height: '68px',\\\\\\\\n              fontSize: '2em',\\\\\\\\n              textAlign: 'center',\\\\\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\\\\\n              border: `3px solid ${digit ? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$W/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorProfile.tsx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'ENDFILE'\\\\\\\\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport AgenticBar, { React.FC<Props> = ({\\\\\\\\n  profile, beautified, companyName,\\\\\\\\n  onChange, onCompanyChange, onBeautify, onSave\\\\\\\\n}) => {\\\\\\\\n  const [isBeautifying, setIsBeautifying] = setIsBeautifying(false);\\\\\\\\n      speak('Done! Your profile looks professional. Say save when ready.');\\\\\\\\n    }, 2000);\\\\\\\\n  }, [profile, companyName, onBeautify]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('beautify') || cmd.includes('enhance')) {\\\\\\\\n      doBeautify();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('save') || cmd.includes('next')) && companyName.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      speak('Saving your profile.', () => onSave());\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\\\\\n      onBeautify('');\\\\\\\\n      setShowBeautified(false);\\\\\\\\n      speak('Profile cleared.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [doBeautify, companyName, onSave, onChange, onBeautify]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    return onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const displayText = showBeautified && beautified ? beautified : profile;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '3.5em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udfea</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Business Profile\\\\\\\\n      </h3>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ maxWidth: '540px', margin: '0 auto' }}>\\\\\\\\n        <input\\\\\\\\n          type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          value={companyName}\\\\\\\\n          onChange={e => onCompanyChange(e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Company Name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          style={{\\\\\\\\n            width: '100%',\\\\\\\\n            padding: '16px 20px',\\\\\\\\n            marginBottom: '16px',\\\\\\\\n            borderRadius: '12px',\\\\\\\\n            border: `2px solid ${companyName ? -p \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$HOOKS_DIR\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$HOOKS_DIR/useVoice.ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'VOICEOF'\\\\\\\\n// useVoice.ts - PROVEN WORKING (same as HTML test)\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Word to digit - EXACT same as working HTML test\\\\\\\\nconst W2D: Record<string, string> = {\\\\\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\\\\\n  'five': '5',\\\\\\\\n  'six': '6',\\\\\\\\n  'seven': '7',\\\\\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function extractDigits(text: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\\\\\n  for (const w of words) {\\\\\\\\n    if (W2D[w]) digits += W2D[w];\\\\\\\\n    else if (/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d$/.test(w)) digits += w;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const raw = text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  return digits.length >= raw.length ? digits : raw;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function formatPhone(d: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const c = d.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\\\\\\\\n  return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3,6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface UseVoiceOptions {\\\\\\\\n  onDigits?: (digits: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onCommand?: (cmd: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onTranscript?: (text: string, isFinal: boolean) => void;\\\\\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface UseVoiceReturn {\\\\\\\\n  isListening: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  isSpeaking: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\\\\\n  start: () => void;\\\\\\\\n  stop: () => void;\\\\\\\\n  speak: (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => void;\\\\\\\\n  stopSpeaking: () => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function useVoice(options: UseVoiceOptions = {}): UseVoiceReturn {\\\\\\\\n  const { onDigits, onCommand, onTranscript, autoStart = true } = options;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [transcript, setTranscript] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const recognitionRef = useRef<SpeechRecognition | null>(null);\\\\\\\\n  const shouldRestartRef = useRef(true);\\\\\\\\n  const ttsUnlockedRef = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Refs to always have latest callbacks\\\\\\\\n  const onDigitsRef = useRef(onDigits);\\\\\\\\n  const onCommandRef = useRef(onCommand);\\\\\\\\n  const onTranscriptRef = useRef(onTranscript);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    onDigitsRef.current = onDigits;\\\\\\\\n    onCommandRef.current = onCommand;\\\\\\\\n    onTranscriptRef.current = onTranscript;\\\\\\\\n  }, [onDigits, onCommand, onTranscript]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Initialize recognition - EXACT same as HTML test\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('[Voice] Speech Recognition not supported');\\\\\\\\n      setError('Speech Recognition not supported. Use Chrome.');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const recognition = new SR();\\\\\\\\n    recognition.continuous = true;\\\\\\\\n    recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\\\\\n    recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\\\\\n    recognitionRef.current = recognition;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[Voice] \\\\\\\\u2705 STARTED');\\\\\\\\n      setIsListening(true);\\\\\\\\n      setError(null);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n      const isFinal = result.isFinal;\\\\\\\\n      const confidence = Math.round((result[0]?.confidence || 0) * 100);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      console.log(`[Voice] Heard: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${text}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (final: ${isFinal}, conf: ${confidence}%)`);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      setTranscript(text);\\\\\\\\n      onTranscriptRef.current?.(text, isFinal);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (isFinal && text) {\\\\\\\\n        // Extract digits\\\\\\\\n        const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\\\\\n        if (digits) {\\\\\\\\n          console.log('[Voice] Digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n          onDigitsRef.current?.(digits);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Send command\\\\\\\\n        onCommandRef.current?.(text.toLowerCase());\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[Voice] Error:', event.error);\\\\\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\\\\\n        setError('Mic blocked. Click \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd12 in address bar \\\\\\\\u2192 Allow');\\\\\\\\n        shouldRestartRef.current = false;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (event.error !== 'no-speech' && event.error !== 'aborted') {\\\\\\\\n        setError('Error: ' + event.error);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    recognition.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[Voice] Ended, shouldRestart:', shouldRestartRef.current);\\\\\\\\n      setIsListening(false);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Auto-restart like HTML test\\\\\\\\n      if (shouldRestartRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n          if (shouldRestartRef.current && recognitionRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n            try {\\\\\\\\n              recognitionRef.current.start();\\\\\\\\n            } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n              console.log('[Voice] Restart error:', e);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }, 100);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Auto-start if enabled\\\\\\\\n    if (autoStart) {\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        if (shouldRestartRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n          try {\\\\\\\\n            recognition.start();\\\\\\\\n            console.log('[Voice] Auto-starting...');\\\\\\\\n          } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n            console.log('[Voice] Auto-start error:', e);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }, 500);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    return () => {\\\\\\\\n      shouldRestartRef.current = false;\\\\\\\\n      try { recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }, [autoStart]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const start = useCallback(() => {\\\\\\\\n    shouldRestartRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n    if (recognitionRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        recognitionRef.current.start();\\\\\\\\n      } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n        console.log('[Voice] Start error:', e);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const stop = useCallback(() => {\\\\\\\\n    shouldRestartRef.current = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (recognitionRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        recognitionRef.current.stop();\\\\\\\\n      } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    setIsListening(false);\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // TTS with unlock mechanism\\\\\\\\n  const speak = useCallback((text: string, onDone?: () => void) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!text) {\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('[Voice] \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0a Speaking:', text);\\\\\\\\n    const synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Cancel any ongoing speech\\\\\\\\n    synth.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Unlock TTS on first user interaction (Safari/iOS requirement)\\\\\\\\n    if (!ttsUnlockedRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n      const unlock = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('');\\\\\\\\n      synth.speak(unlock);\\\\\\\\n      ttsUnlockedRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    setIsSpeaking(true);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Stop listening while speaking to avoid feedback\\\\\\\\n    if (recognitionRef.current && isListening) {\\\\\\\\n      shouldRestartRef.current = false;\\\\\\\\n      try { recognitionRef.current.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Get a good voice\\\\\\\\n    const voices = synth.getVoices();\\\\\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.startsWith('en')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US'));\\\\\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[Voice] Speech ended');\\\\\\\\n      setIsSpeaking(false);\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Resume listening\\\\\\\\n      shouldRestartRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        if (shouldRestartRef.current && recognitionRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n          try { recognitionRef.current.start(); } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }, 200);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onerror = (e) => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[Voice] Speech error:', e);\\\\\\\\n      setIsSpeaking(false);\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      shouldRestartRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Small delay then speak\\\\\\\\n    setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n      synth.speak(utterance);\\\\\\\\n    }, 50);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isListening]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const stopSpeaking = useCallback(() => {\\\\\\\\n    window.speechSynthesis.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    setIsSpeaking(false);\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    isListening,\\\\\\\\n    isSpeaking,\\\\\\\\n    transcript,\\\\\\\\n    error,\\\\\\\\n    start,\\\\\\\\n    stop,\\\\\\\\n    speak,\\\\\\\\n    stopSpeaking\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default useVoice;\\\\\\\\nVOICEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Created VOICE\\\\\\\\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useVoice, extractDigits, formatPhone } from '../../hooks/useVoice';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Props {\\\\\\\\n  value: string;\\\\\\\\n  onChange: (phone: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onNext: () => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst VendorPhone: React.FC<Props> = ({ value, onChange, onNext }) => {\\\\\\\\n  const [allDigits, setAllDigits] = useState(value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, ''));\\\\\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle new digits from voice\\\\\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorPhone] Got digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n    setAllDigits(prev => {\\\\\\\\n      const newVal = (prev + digits).slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n      onChange(newVal);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (newVal.length === 10) {\\\\\\\\n        voice.speak(`Got it! ${formatPhone(newVal)}. Say yes to confirm.`);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (newVal.length > 0 && digits) {\\\\\\\\n        voice.speak(`${10 - newVal.length} more.`);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return newVal;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, [onChange]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle commands\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorPhone] Command:', cmd);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('yes') || cmd.includes('confirm') || cmd.includes('send') || cmd.includes('correct')) && allDigits.length >= 10) {\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Sending code.', () => onNext());\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset') || cmd.includes('start over')) {\\\\\\\\n      setAllDigits('');\\\\\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Cleared. Say your number again.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('no') || cmd.includes('wrong')) {\\\\\\\\n      setAllDigits('');\\\\\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Okay, cleared. Try again.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [allDigits, onChange, onNext]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const voice = useVoice({\\\\\\\\n    onDigits: handleDigits,\\\\\\\\n    onCommand: handleCommand,\\\\\\\\n    autoStart: true\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Welcome message - on first interaction\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      // Delay to let recognition start first\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        voice.speak('Welcome! Say your phone number. Like seven zero three.');\\\\\\\\n      }, 1000);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Sync state with prop\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const cleaned = value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    if (cleaned !== allDigits) {\\\\\\\\n      setAllDigits(cleaned);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [value]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const canSubmit = allDigits.length >= 10;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udcf1</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Enter Your Phone Number\\\\\\\\n      </h3>\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        Say digits like \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"seven zero three\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or type below\\\\\\\\n      </p>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      {/* Phone Input */}\\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '1.5em' }}>+1</span>\\\\\\\\n        <input\\\\\\\\n          type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          value={formatPhone(allDigits)}\\\\\\\\n          onChange={e => {\\\\\\\\n            const clean = e.target.value.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n            setAllDigits(clean);\\\\\\\\n            onChange(clean);\\\\\\\\n          }}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"000-000-0000\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          style={{\\\\\\\\n            fontSize: '2em',\\\\\\\\n            padding: '18px 28px',\\\\\\\\n            borderRadius: '14px',\\\\\\\\n            border: `3px solid ${canSubmit ? React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useVoice, extractDigits } from '../../hooks/useVoice';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Props {\\\\\\\\n  phone: string;\\\\\\\\n  onVerified: () => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst VendorOTP: React.FC<Props> = ({ phone, onVerified }) => {\\\\\\\\n  const [otp, setOtp] = useState<string[]>(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\\\\\n  const [error, setError] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const inputRefs = useRef<(HTMLInputElement | null)[]>([]);\\\\\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorOTP] Digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(prev => {\\\\\\\\n      const filled = prev.filter(d => d).length;\\\\\\\\n      const next = [...prev];\\\\\\\\n      let idx = filled;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      for (const d of digits) {\\\\\\\\n        if (idx < 6) {\\\\\\\\n          next[idx] = d;\\\\\\\\n          idx++;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Check if complete\\\\\\\\n      if (next.filter(d => d).length === 6) {\\\\\\\\n        const code = next.join('');\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => verifyCode(code), 300);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      return next;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const verifyCode = (code: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (code === '123456') {\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Verified! Welcome.', () => onVerified());\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      setError('Invalid code. Try: 123456');\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Invalid code. Say one two three four five six.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      setOtp(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\\\\\n      setError('');\\\\\\\\n      voice.speak('Cleared.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const voice = useVoice({\\\\\\\\n    onDigits: handleDigits,\\\\\\\\n    onCommand: handleCommand,\\\\\\\\n    autoStart: true\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        voice.speak('Enter the 6 digit code. Demo: one two three four five six.');\\\\\\\\n      }, 800);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const handleInput = (index: number, val: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\\\\\\\\n    const next = [...otp];\\\\\\\\n    next[index] = val.slice(-1);\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(next);\\\\\\\\n    if (val && index < 5) inputRefs.current[index + 1]?.focus();\\\\\\\\n    if (next.every(d => d)) verifyCode(next.join(''));\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd10</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>Verification Code</h3>\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>Sent to {phone}</p>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        {otp.map((d, i) => (\\\\\\\\n          <input\\\\\\\\n            key={i}\\\\\\\\n            ref={el => inputRefs.current[i] = el}\\\\\\\\n            type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            inputMode=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"numeric\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            maxLength={1}\\\\\\\\n            value={d}\\\\\\\\n            onChange={e => handleInput(i, e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n            style={{\\\\\\\\n              width: '55px',\\\\\\\\n              height: '65px',\\\\\\\\n              fontSize: '2em',\\\\\\\\n              textAlign: 'center',\\\\\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\\\\\n              border: `3px solid ${d ? 'rgba(76,175,80,0.15)' : 'rgba(244,67,54,0.1)',\\\\\\\\n        border: `2px solid ${voice.isListening ? '#4CAF50' : '#f44336'}`,\\\\\\\\n        borderRadius: '12px'\\\\\\\\n      }}>\\\\\\\\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>\\\\\\\\n          <span style={{ color: voice.isListening ? '\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udfa4 Listening' : '\\\\\\\\u23f9 Stopped'}\\\\\\\\n          </span>\\\\\\\\n          {!voice.isListening ? \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n// VOICE SERVICE - SINGLETON\\\\\\\\n// Only ONE instance of speech recognition/synthesis for the entire app\\\\\\\\n// All components subscribe to state changes, don't create their own\\\\\\\\n// \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype VoiceState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\ntype Listener = (state: VoiceServiceState) => void;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface VoiceServiceState {\\\\\\\\n  state: VoiceState;\\\\\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\\\\\n  interimTranscript: string;\\\\\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Word to digit mapping\\\\\\\\nconst W2D: Record<string, string> = {\\\\\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\\\\\n  'five': '5', 'six': '6', 'seven': '7',\\\\\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function extractDigits(text: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\\\\\n  for (const w of words) {\\\\\\\\n    if (W2D[w]) digits += W2D[w];\\\\\\\\n    else if (/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d$/.test(w)) digits += w;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const raw = text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  return digits.length >= raw.length ? digits : raw;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function formatPhone(d: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const c = d.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\\\\\\\\n  return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3,6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass VoiceService {\\\\\\\\n  private static instance: VoiceService | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private recognition: SpeechRecognition | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private synth: SpeechSynthesis | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private listeners: Set<Listener> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  private digitHandlers: Set<(digits: string) => void> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  private commandHandlers: Set<(cmd: string) => void> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private currentState: VoiceServiceState = {\\\\\\\\n    state: 'IDLE',\\\\\\\\n    transcript: '',\\\\\\\\n    interimTranscript: '',\\\\\\\\n    error: null\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n  private isInitialized = false;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private constructor() {\\\\\\\\n    // Private constructor for singleton\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  static getInstance(): VoiceService {\\\\\\\\n    if (!VoiceService.instance) {\\\\\\\\n      VoiceService.instance = new VoiceService();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return VoiceService.instance;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  init(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (this.isInitialized) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Already initialized');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] Initializing...');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ error: 'Speech not supported. Use Chrome.' });\\\\\\\\n      console.error('[VoiceService] Speech Recognition not supported');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition = new SR();\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.continuous = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\u2705 LISTENING');\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'LISTENING', error: null });\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n      const isFinal = result.isFinal;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      console.log(`[VoiceService] Heard: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${text}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (final: ${isFinal})`);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (isFinal) {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ transcript: text, interimTranscript: '' });\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Extract and dispatch digits\\\\\\\\n        const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\\\\\n        if (digits) {\\\\\\\\n          console.log('[VoiceService] Digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n          this.digitHandlers.forEach(h => h(digits));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Dispatch command\\\\\\\\n        this.commandHandlers.forEach(h => h(text.toLowerCase()));\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ interimTranscript: text });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Error:', event.error);\\\\\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE', error: 'Mic blocked. Click \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd12 \\\\\\\\u2192 Allow' });\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (event.error !== 'no-speech' && event.error !== 'aborted') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ error: event.error });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Ended, shouldRestart:', this.shouldRestart);\\\\\\\\n      if (this.shouldRestart && this.currentState.state !== 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 100);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (this.currentState.state !== 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.isInitialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\u2705 Initialized');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private updateState(partial: Partial<VoiceServiceState>): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...partial };\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.forEach(l => l(this.currentState));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  getState(): VoiceServiceState {\\\\\\\\n    return this.currentState;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  subscribe(listener: Listener): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\\\\\\\\n    // Immediately call with current state\\\\\\\\n    listener(this.currentState);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  onDigits(handler: (digits: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.digitHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.digitHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  onCommand(handler: (cmd: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.commandHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  startListening(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      this.init();\\\\\\\\n      if (!this.recognition) return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Don't start if speaking\\\\\\\\n    if (this.currentState.state === 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Cannot start while speaking');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      this.recognition.start();\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      // Already started, ignore\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  stopListening(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        this.recognition.stop();\\\\\\\\n      } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  speak(text: string, onDone?: () => void): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!text || !this.synth) {\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0a Speaking:', text);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Stop listening while speaking (Audio Mutex)\\\\\\\\n    const wasListening = this.shouldRestart;\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.synth.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'SPEAKING' });\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Get best voice\\\\\\\\n    const voices = this.synth.getVoices();\\\\\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.startsWith('en')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US'));\\\\\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Speech ended');\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Resume listening if was listening before\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onerror = () => {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Speak after small delay\\\\\\\\n    setTimeout(() => this.synth?.speak(utterance), 50);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  stopSpeaking(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.synth?.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Export singleton instance\\\\\\\\nexport const voiceService = VoiceService.getInstance();\\\\\\\\nexport default voiceService;\\\\\\\\nSVCEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Created voiceService.ts (Singleton)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n# STEP 2: Create useVoice hook that uses the singleton\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nmkdir -p \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/hooks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/hooks/useVoice.ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'HOOKEOF'\\\\\\\\n// useVoice.ts - Hook that connects to the singleton VoiceService\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { voiceService, extractDigits, formatPhone } from '../services/voiceService';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { extractDigits, formatPhone };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface UseVoiceOptions {\\\\\\\\n  onDigits?: (digits: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onCommand?: (cmd: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function useVoice(options: UseVoiceOptions = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const { onDigits, onCommand, autoStart = true } = options;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const [state, setState] = useState(voiceService.getState());\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Subscribe to voice service state changes\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    voiceService.init();\\\\\\\\n    return voiceService.subscribe(setState);\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register digit handler\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onDigits) {\\\\\\\\n      return voiceService.onDigits(onDigits);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onDigits]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register command handler\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onCommand) {\\\\\\\\n      return voiceService.onCommand(onCommand);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onCommand]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Auto-start listening\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (autoStart) {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.startListening();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [autoStart]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    isListening: state.state === 'LISTENING',\\\\\\\\n    isSpeaking: state.state === 'SPEAKING',\\\\\\\\n    isPaused: state.state === 'PAUSED',\\\\\\\\n    transcript: state.transcript,\\\\\\\\n    interimTranscript: state.interimTranscript,\\\\\\\\n    error: state.error,\\\\\\\\n    start: useCallback(() => voiceService.startListening(), []),\\\\\\\\n    stop: useCallback(() => voiceService.stopListening(), []),\\\\\\\\n    speak: useCallback((text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceService.speak(text, onDone), []),\\\\\\\\n    stopSpeaking: useCallback(() => voiceService.stopSpeaking(), [])\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default useVoice;\\\\\\\\nHOOKEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Created useVoice.ts (uses singleton)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#
