\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype VoiceState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\ntype Listener = (state: VoiceServiceState) => void;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface VoiceServiceState {\\\\\\\\n  state: VoiceState;\\\\\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\\\\\n  interimTranscript: string;\\\\\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Word to digit mapping\\\\\\\\nconst W2D: Record<string, string> = {\\\\\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\\\\\n  'five': '5', 'six': '6', 'seven': '7',\\\\\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function extractDigits(text: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\\\\\n  for (const w of words) {\\\\\\\\n    if (W2D[w]) digits += W2D[w];\\\\\\\\n    else if (/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d$/.test(w)) digits += w;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const raw = text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  return digits.length >= raw.length ? digits : raw;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function formatPhone(d: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const c = d.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\\\\\\\\n  return `${c.slice(0,3)}-${c.slice(3,6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass VoiceService {\\\\\\\\n  private static instance: VoiceService | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private recognition: SpeechRecognition | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private synth: SpeechSynthesis | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private listeners: Set<Listener> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  private digitHandlers: Set<(digits: string) => void> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  private commandHandlers: Set<(cmd: string) => void> = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private currentState: VoiceServiceState = {\\\\\\\\n    state: 'IDLE',\\\\\\\\n    transcript: '',\\\\\\\\n    interimTranscript: '',\\\\\\\\n    error: null\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n  private isInitialized = false;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private constructor() {\\\\\\\\n    // Private constructor for singleton\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  static getInstance(): VoiceService {\\\\\\\\n    if (!VoiceService.instance) {\\\\\\\\n      VoiceService.instance = new VoiceService();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return VoiceService.instance;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  init(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (this.isInitialized) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Already initialized');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] Initializing...');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ error: 'Speech not supported. Use Chrome.' });\\\\\\\\n      console.error('[VoiceService] Speech Recognition not supported');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition = new SR();\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.continuous = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\u2705 LISTENING');\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'LISTENING', error: null });\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n      const isFinal = result.isFinal;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      console.log(`[VoiceService] Heard: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${text}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (final: ${isFinal})`);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (isFinal) {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ transcript: text, interimTranscript: '' });\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Extract and dispatch digits\\\\\\\\n        const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\\\\\n        if (digits) {\\\\\\\\n          console.log('[VoiceService] Digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n          this.digitHandlers.forEach(h => h(digits));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Dispatch command\\\\\\\\n        this.commandHandlers.forEach(h => h(text.toLowerCase()));\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ interimTranscript: text });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Error:', event.error);\\\\\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE', error: 'Mic blocked. Click \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd12 \\\\\\\\u2192 Allow' });\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (event.error !== 'no-speech' && event.error !== 'aborted') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ error: event.error });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.recognition.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Ended, shouldRestart:', this.shouldRestart);\\\\\\\\n      if (this.shouldRestart && this.currentState.state !== 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 100);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (this.currentState.state !== 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n        this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.isInitialized = true;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\u2705 Initialized');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private updateState(partial: Partial<VoiceServiceState>): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...partial };\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.forEach(l => l(this.currentState));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  getState(): VoiceServiceState {\\\\\\\\n    return this.currentState;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  subscribe(listener: Listener): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\\\\\\\\n    // Immediately call with current state\\\\\\\\n    listener(this.currentState);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  onDigits(handler: (digits: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.digitHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.digitHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  onCommand(handler: (cmd: string) => void): () => void {\\\\\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.add(handler);\\\\\\\\n    return () => this.commandHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  startListening(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      this.init();\\\\\\\\n      if (!this.recognition) return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Don't start if speaking\\\\\\\\n    if (this.currentState.state === 'SPEAKING') {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Cannot start while speaking');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      this.recognition.start();\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      // Already started, ignore\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  stopListening(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        this.recognition.stop();\\\\\\\\n      } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  speak(text: string, onDone?: () => void): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!text || !this.synth) {\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceService] \\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0a Speaking:', text);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Stop listening while speaking (Audio Mutex)\\\\\\\\n    const wasListening = this.shouldRestart;\\\\\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    this.synth.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'SPEAKING' });\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1.0;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Get best voice\\\\\\\\n    const voices = this.synth.getVoices();\\\\\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.startsWith('en')) ||\\\\\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US'));\\\\\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceService] Speech ended');\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Resume listening if was listening before\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    utterance.onerror = () => {\\\\\\\\n      this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.startListening(), 200);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Speak after small delay\\\\\\\\n    setTimeout(() => this.synth?.speak(utterance), 50);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  stopSpeaking(): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.synth?.cancel();\\\\\\\\n    this.updateState({ state: 'IDLE' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Export singleton instance\\\\\\\\nexport const voiceService = VoiceService.getInstance();\\\\\\\\nexport default voiceService;\\\\\\\\nSVCEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Created voiceService.ts (Singleton)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n# STEP 2: Create useVoice hook that uses the singleton\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nmkdir -p \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/hooks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ncat > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/hooks/useVoice.ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'HOOKEOF'\\\\\\\\n// useVoice.ts - Hook that connects to the singleton VoiceService\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { voiceService, extractDigits, formatPhone } from '../services/voiceService';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { extractDigits, formatPhone };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface UseVoiceOptions {\\\\\\\\n  onDigits?: (digits: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onCommand?: (cmd: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function useVoice(options: UseVoiceOptions = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const { onDigits, onCommand, autoStart = true } = options;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const [state, setState] = useState(voiceService.getState());\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Subscribe to voice service state changes\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    voiceService.init();\\\\\\\\n    return voiceService.subscribe(setState);\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register digit handler\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onDigits) {\\\\\\\\n      return voiceService.onDigits(onDigits);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onDigits]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register command handler\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (onCommand) {\\\\\\\\n      return voiceService.onCommand(onCommand);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onCommand]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Auto-start listening\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (autoStart) {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.startListening();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [autoStart]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    isListening: state.state === 'LISTENING',\\\\\\\\n    isSpeaking: state.state === 'SPEAKING',\\\\\\\\n    isPaused: state.state === 'PAUSED',\\\\\\\\n    transcript: state.transcript,\\\\\\\\n    interimTranscript: state.interimTranscript,\\\\\\\\n    error: state.error,\\\\\\\\n    start: useCallback(() => voiceService.startListening(), []),\\\\\\\\n    stop: useCallback(() => voiceService.stopListening(), []),\\\\\\\\n    speak: useCallback((text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceService.speak(text, onDone), []),\\\\\\\\n    stopSpeaking: useCallback(() => voiceService.stopSpeaking(), [])\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default useVoice;\\\\\\\\nHOOKEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Created useVoice.ts (uses singleton)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n# > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/AgenticBar.tsx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'BAREOF'\\\\\\\\n// \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n// AGENTIC BAR - The ONE unified voice interface for ALL of VistaView\\\\\\\\n// Shows at bottom of modals, controls the singleton voice service\\\\\\\\n// \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport React from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useVoice } from '../hooks/useVoice';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface AgenticBarProps {\\\\\\\\n  context?: string; // e.g., \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Phone Entry\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OTP Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  hints?: string[]; // e.g., [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"say digits\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"say 'clear'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n  compact?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst AgenticBar: React.FC<AgenticBarProps> = ({ context, hints, compact = false }) => {\\\\\\\\n  const voice = useVoice({ autoStart: false }); // Don't auto-start, let parent control\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const isActive = voice.isListening;\\\\\\\\n  const statusColor = voice.isSpeaking ? '#FFD700' : isActive ? '#4CAF50' : '#f44336';\\\\\\\\n  const statusText = voice.isSpeaking ? '\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0a Speaking...' : isActive ? '\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udfa4 Listening...' : '\\\\\\\\u25a0 Stopped';\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  if (compact) {\\\\\\\\n    return (\\\\\\\\n      <div style={{\\\\\\\\n        display: 'flex',\\\\\\\\n        alignItems: 'center',\\\\\\\\n        gap: '10px',\\\\\\\\n        padding: '8px 14px',\\\\\\\\n        background: isActive ? 'rgba(76,175,80,0.15)' : 'rgba(244,67,54,0.1)',\\\\\\\\n        border: `2px solid ${statusColor}`,\\\\\\\\n        borderRadius: '20px'\\\\\\\\n      }}>\\\\\\\\n        <span style={{\\\\\\\\n          width: '10px', height: '10px', borderRadius: '50%',\\\\\\\\n          background: statusColor,\\\\\\\\n          animation: isActive ? 10);\\\\\\\\n      onChange(updated);\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (updated.length === 10) {\\\\\\\\n        voiceService.speak(`Got it! ${formatPhone(updated)}. Say yes to confirm, or clear to reset.`);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (newDigits) {\\\\\\\\n        voiceService.speak(`${10 - updated.length} more.`);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return updated;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, [onChange]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle commands\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorPhone] Command:', cmd);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('yes') || cmd.includes('confirm') || cmd.includes('send') || cmd.includes('correct')) && digits.length >= 10) {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Sending verification code.', () => onNext());\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset') || cmd.includes('start over')) {\\\\\\\\n      setDigits('');\\\\\\\\n      onChange('');\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Cleared. Say your number again.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [digits, onChange, onNext]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register handlers\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const unsubDigits = voiceService.onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\\\\\n    const unsubCommand = voiceService.onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n    return () => { unsubDigits(); unsubCommand(); };\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Welcome + auto-start\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.init();\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        voiceService.speak('Welcome to VistaView! useState<string[]>(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\\\\\n  const [error, setError] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const inputRefs = useRef<(HTMLInputElement | null)[]>([]);\\\\\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const verifyCode = useCallback((code: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (code === '123456') {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Verified! Welcome aboard.', () => onVerified());\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      setError('Invalid code. Demo: 123456');\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Invalid code. The demo code is one two three four five six.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [onVerified]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle digits\\\\\\\\n  const handleDigits = useCallback((digits: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorOTP] Digits:', digits);\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(prev => {\\\\\\\\n      const filled = prev.filter(d => d).length;\\\\\\\\n      const next = [...prev];\\\\\\\\n      let idx = filled;\\\\\\\\n      for (const d of digits) {\\\\\\\\n        if (idx < 6) { next[idx] = d; idx++; }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (next.filter(d => d).length === 6) {\\\\\\\\n        setTimeout(() => verifyCode(next.join('')), 300);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return next;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, [verifyCode]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle commands\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      setOtp(['', '', '', '', '', '']);\\\\\\\\n      setError('');\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Cleared.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register handlers\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    const unsubDigits = voiceService.onDigits(handleDigits);\\\\\\\\n    const unsubCommand = voiceService.onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n    return () => { unsubDigits(); unsubCommand(); };\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleDigits, handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Welcome\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        voiceService.speak('Enter the 6 digit code. Demo code is one two three four five six.', () => {\\\\\\\\n          voiceService.startListening();\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }, 300);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const handleInput = (index: number, val: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\\\\\\\\n    const next = [...otp];\\\\\\\\n    next[index] = val.slice(-1);\\\\\\\\n    setOtp(next);\\\\\\\\n    if (val && index < 5) inputRefs.current[index + 1]?.focus();\\\\\\\\n    if (next.every(d => d)) verifyCode(next.join(''));\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '4em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd10</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0 8px', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>Verification Code</h3>\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '24px' }}>Sent to {phone}</p>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>\\\\\\\\n        {otp.map((d, i) => (\\\\\\\\n          <input key={i} ref={el => inputRefs.current[i] = el}\\\\\\\\n            type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" inputMode=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"numeric\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" maxLength={1} value={d}\\\\\\\\n            onChange={e => handleInput(i, e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n            style={{\\\\\\\\n              width: '55px', height: '65px', fontSize: '2em', textAlign: 'center',\\\\\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px', border: `3px solid ${d ? '#4CAF50' : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.4)'}`,\\\\\\\\n              background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', color: '#fff'\\\\\\\\n            }}\\\\\\\\n          />\\\\\\\\n        ))}\\\\\\\\n      </div>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      {error && <p style={{ color: '#f44336', marginBottom: '16px' }}>{error}</p>}\\\\\\\\n      <p style={{ color: '#555', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udca1 Demo: 123456</p>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      <AgenticBar context=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"OTP Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" hints={['Say: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"one two three four five six\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"', > \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"$WORKING_DIR/src/components/signin/vendor/VendorProfile.tsx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" << 'PROFEOF'\\\\\\\\n// VendorProfile.tsx - Uses unified AgenticBar\\\\\\\\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport AgenticBar from '../../AgenticBar';\\\\\\\\nimport { voiceService } from '../../../services/voiceService';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Props {\\\\\\\\n  profile: string;\\\\\\\\n  beautified: string;\\\\\\\\n  companyName: string;\\\\\\\\n  onChange: (profile: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onCompanyChange: (name: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onBeautify: (beautified: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n  onSave: () => void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst VendorProfile: React.FC<Props> = ({ profile, beautified, companyName, onChange, onCompanyChange, onBeautify, onSave }) => {\\\\\\\\n  const [isBeautifying, setIsBeautifying] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [showBeautified, setShowBeautified] = useState(!!beautified);\\\\\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const doBeautify = useCallback(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!profile.trim() && !companyName.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Enter company name first.');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    setIsBeautifying(true);\\\\\\\\n    voiceService.speak('Enhancing your profile with AI...');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n      const enhanced = `\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udfe2 ${companyName || 'Your Company'}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPremium solutions provider specializing in ${profile || 'quality products'}.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2728 Why Choose Us:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2022 Exceptional quality and craftsmanship\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2022 Customer-focused service excellence  \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2022 Competitive pricing with premium value\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udf1f Trusted by homeowners and designers on VistaView - The World's #1 Real Estate Marketplace.`;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      onBeautify(enhanced);\\\\\\\\n      setShowBeautified(true);\\\\\\\\n      setIsBeautifying(false);\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Done! Your profile looks professional now. Say save to continue.');\\\\\\\\n    }, 1500);\\\\\\\\n  }, [profile, companyName, onBeautify]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Handle commands\\\\\\\\n  const handleCommand = useCallback((cmd: string) => {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[VendorProfile] Command:', cmd);\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('beautify') || cmd.includes('enhance')) doBeautify();\\\\\\\\n    if ((cmd.includes('save') || cmd.includes('next') || cmd.includes('continue')) && companyName.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Saving profile.', () => onSave());\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (cmd.includes('clear') || cmd.includes('reset')) {\\\\\\\\n      onChange(''); onBeautify(''); setShowBeautified(false);\\\\\\\\n      voiceService.speak('Cleared.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [doBeautify, companyName, onSave, onChange, onBeautify]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Register handler\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    return voiceService.onCommand(handleCommand);\\\\\\\\n  }, [handleCommand]);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // Welcome\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      setTimeout(() => {\\\\\\\\n        voiceService.speak('Tell me about your business. Enter company name and description. Say beautify to enhance.', () => {\\\\\\\\n          voiceService.startListening();\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }, 300);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  const displayText = showBeautified && beautified ? beautified : profile;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\\\\\n      <span style={{ fontSize: '3.5em' }}>\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udfea</span>\\\\\\\\n      <h3 style={{ color: '#B8860B', margin: '16px 0', fontSize: '1.4em' }}>Business Profile</h3>\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      <div style={{ maxWidth: '520px', margin: '0 auto' }}>\\\\\\\\n        <input type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" value={companyName} onChange={e => onCompanyChange(e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Company Name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          style={{ width: '100%', padding: '16px 20px', marginBottom: '16px', borderRadius: '12px',\\\\\\\\n            border: `2px solid ${companyName ? '#B8860B' : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.4)'}`,\\\\\\\\n            background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', color: '#fff', fontSize: '1.1em' }}\\\\\\\\n        />\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        <textarea value={displayText}\\\\\\\\n          onChange={e => { onChange(e.target.value); if (showBeautified) { setShowBeautified(false); onBeautify(''); } }}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"What do you sell?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" rows={showBeautified ? 14 : 5}\\\\\\\\n          style={{ width: '100%', padding: '16px 20px', marginBottom: '16px', borderRadius: '12px',\\\\\\\\n            border: `2px solid ${showBeautified ? '#4CAF50' : 'rgba(184,134,11,0.4)'}`,\\\\\\\\n            background: showBeautified ? 'rgba(76,175,80,0.1)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\\\\\\\\n            color: '#fff', fontSize: '1em', resize: 'vertical', lineHeight: 1.6 }}\\\\\\\\n        />\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        {showBeautified && (\\\\\\\\n          <div style={{ background: 'rgba(76,175,80,0.15)', border: '1px solid #4CAF50',\\\\\\\\n            borderRadius: '10px', padding: '14px', marginBottom: '16px', textAlign: 'left' }}>\\\\\\\\n            <span style={{ color: '#4CAF50', fontWeight: 700 }}>\\\\\\\\u2728 AI Enhanced</span>\\\\\\\\n          </div>\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '14px', justifyContent: 'center', marginBottom: '16px' }}>\\\\\\\\n          <button onClick={doBeautify} disabled={isBeautifying}\\\\\\\\n            style={{ padding: '16px 32px', background: 'transparent', color: '#B8860B',\\\\\\\\n              border: '2px solid #B8860B', borderRadius: '28px', cursor: 'pointer',\\\\\\\\n              fontWeight: 700, opacity: isBeautifying ? 0.6 : 1 }}>\\\\\\\\n            {isBeautifying ? '\\\\\\\\u23f3 Working...' : '\\\\\\\\u2728 Beautify'}\\\\\\\\n          </button>\\\\\\\\n          <button onClick={() => voiceService.speak('Saving.', () => onSave())} disabled={!companyName.trim()}\\\\\\\\n            style={{ padding: '16px 36px',\\\\\\\\n              background: companyName.trim() ? 'linear-gradient(135deg, #B8860B, #DAA520)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\\\\\n              color: companyName.trim() ? '#000' : '#555', border: 'none', borderRadius: '28px',\\\\\\\\n              cursor: companyName.trim() ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed', fontWeight: 700 }}>\\\\\\\\n            Save \\\\\\\\u2192\\\\\\\\n          </button>\\\\\\\\n        </div>\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        <AgenticBar context=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Business Profile\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" hints={['\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"beautify\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"', '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"', '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"clear\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"']} />\\\\\\\\n      </div>\\\\\\\\n    </div>\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default VendorProfile;\\\\\\\\nPROFEOF\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\necho \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Updated VendorProfile.tsx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n# STEP 7: Remove the old MR. \\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\u2550\\\\n\\\\nexport type AudioState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\nexport type VoiceMode = 'interactive' | 'talkative' | 'text';\\\\n\\\\n// Word to digit mapping - PROVEN WORKING\\\\nconst W2D: Record<string, string> = {\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\n  'five': '5',\\\\n  'six': '6',\\\\n  'seven': '7',\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\n};\\\\n\\\\nexport function extractDigits(text: string): string {\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\n  for (const w of words) {\\\\n    if (W2D[w]) digits += W2D[w];\\\\n    else if (/^\\\\\\\\d$/.test(w)) digits += w;\\\\n  }\\\\n  const raw = text.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\n  return digits.length >= raw.length ? digits : raw;\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\nexport function formatPhone(d: string): string {\\\\n  const c = d.replace(/\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\\\\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0, 3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\\\\n  return `${c.slice(0, 3)}-${c.slice(3, 6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\ninterface BrainState {\\\\n  audioState: AudioState;\\\\n  mode: VoiceMode;\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\n  interim: string;\\\\n  context: string;\\\\n  error:  init(): boolean {\\\\n    if (this.initialized) return true;\\\\n    \\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Initializing...');\\\\n    \\\\n    const SR = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;\\\\n    if (!SR) {\\\\n      this.updateState({ error: 'Speech not supported. Use Chrome.' });\\\\n      console.error('[VoiceBrain] Speech Recognition not supported');\\\\n      return false;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    this.synth = window.speechSynthesis;\\\\n    this.recognition = new SR();\\\\n    this.recognition.continuous = true;\\\\n    this.recognition.interimResults = true;\\\\n    this.recognition.lang = 'en-US';\\\\n    this.recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;\\\\n    \\\\n    this.recognition.onstart = () => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] \\\\u2705 LISTENING');\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'LISTENING', error: null });\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    this.recognition.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {\\\\n      const result = event.results[event.results.length - 1];\\\\n      const text = result[0]?.transcript?.trim() || '';\\\\n      const isFinal = result.isFinal;\\\\n      \\\\n      if (isFinal && text) {\\\\n        console.log('[VoiceBrain] Heard:', text);\\\\n        this.updateState({ transcript: text, interim: '' });\\\\n        this.processText(text.toLowerCase());\\\\n      } else {\\\\n        this.updateState({ interim: text });\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    this.recognition.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Error:', event.error);\\\\n      if (event.error === 'not-allowed') {\\\\n        this.updateState({ \\\\n          audioState: 'IDLE', \\\\n          error: 'Microphone blocked. Click \\\\ud83d\\\\udd12 in address bar \\\\u2192 Allow' \\\\n        });\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n      } else if (event.error !== 'no-speech' && event.error !== 'aborted') {\\\\n        this.updateState({ error: `Error: ${event.error}` });\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    this.recognition.onend = () => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Ended, shouldRestart:', this.shouldRestart, 'state:', this.state.audioState);\\\\n      if (this.shouldRestart && this.state.audioState !== 'SPEAKING' && this.state.audioState !== 'PAUSED') {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\n          if (this.shouldRestart && this.recognition) {\\\\n            try { \\\\n              this.recognition.start(); \\\\n            } catch (e) { \\\\n {\\\\n        this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    this.initialized = true;\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] \\\\u2705 Initialized');\\\\n    return  private updateState(partial: Partial<BrainState>): void {\\\\n    this.state = { ...this.state, ...partial };\\\\n    this.listeners.forEach(l => l(this.state));\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  getState(): BrainState {\\\\n    return { ...this.state };\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  subscribe(listener: StateListener): () => void {\\\\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\\\\n    listener(this.state);\\\\n    return this.commandHandlers.delete(handler);\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  setContext(context: string): void {\\\\n    this.updateState({ context });\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Context:', context);\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  setMode(mode: VoiceMode): void {\\\\n    this.updateState({ mode });\\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Mode:', mode);\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  //  private processText(text: string): void {\\\\n    // Pause commands\\\\n    if (text.includes('hey') || text === 'stop' || text === 'pause' || text.includes('wait')) {\\\\n      this.pause();\\\\n      this.speak(\\\\\\\"I'm here when you need me. Say resume to continue.\\\\\\\");\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Resume commands\\\\n    if (text === 'resume' || text === 'continue' || text === 'go ahead') {\\\\n      this.resume();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Mode switching\\\\n    if (text.includes('talkative mode')) {\\\\n      this.setMode('talkative');\\\\n      this.speak('Talkative mode. I will give more details.');\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (text.includes('text mode') || text.includes('silent')) {\\\\n      this.setMode('text');\\\\n      this.speak('Text mode. I will stay quiet.');\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (text.includes('interactive mode')) {\\\\n      this.setMode('interactive');\\\\n      this.speak('Interactive mode.');\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Extract digits\\\\n    const digits = extractDigits(text);\\\\n    if (digits) {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Digits:', digits);\\\\n      this.digitHandlers.forEach(h => h(digits));\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Dispatch to command handlers\\\\n    this.commandHandlers.forEach(h => h(text));\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  // \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\n  // AUDIO CONTROL (with Mutex)\\\\n  // \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\n  start(): void {\\\\n    if (!this.init()) return;\\\\n    \\\\n    // Audio Mutex: Don't start listening if speaking\\\\n    if (this.state.audioState === 'SPEAKING') {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Cannot start while speaking');\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { \\\\n        this.recognition.start(); \\\\n      } catch (e) { \\\\n        console.log('[VoiceBrain] Start error (may already be running):', e);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  stop(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  pause(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'PAUSED' });\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  resume(): void {\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'LISTENING' });\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.start(); } catch (e) {}\\\\n    }\\\\n    this.speak(\\\\\\\"I'm listening.\\\\\\\");\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  // \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\n  // TEXT-TO-SPEECH (with Mutex)\\\\n  // \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\n  speak(text: string, onDone?: () => void): void {\\\\n    if (!text) {\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Text mode = silent\\\\n    if (this.state.mode === 'text') {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Text mode, skipping TTS:', text);\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    if (!this.init() || !this.synth) {\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    console.log('[VoiceBrain] Speaking:', text);\\\\n    \\\\n    // AUDIO MUTEX: Stop listening while speaking\\\\n    const wasListening = this.shouldRestart;\\\\n    this.shouldRestart = false;\\\\n    if (this.recognition) {\\\\n      try { this.recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}\\\\n    }\\\\n    \\\\n    // Cancel any ongoing speech\\\\n    this.synth.cancel();\\\\n    this.updateState({ audioState: 'SPEAKING' });\\\\n    \\\\n    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);\\\\n    utterance.rate = 1.0;\\\\n    utterance.pitch = 1.0;\\\\n    utterance.volume = 1.0;\\\\n    \\\\n    // Get best voice\\\\n    const voices = this.synth.getVoices();\\\\n    const voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Samantha')) ||\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.startsWith('en')) ||\\\\n                  voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('en-US') && !v.name.includes('Compact'));\\\\n    if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;\\\\n    \\\\n    utterance.onend = () => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Speech ended');\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: wasListening ? 'LISTENING' : 'IDLE' });\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      \\\\n      // Resume listening if was listening before\\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    utterance.onerror = (e) => {\\\\n      console.log('[VoiceBrain] Speech error:', e);\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n      onDone?.();\\\\n      \\\\n      if (wasListening) {\\\\n        this.shouldRestart = true;\\\\n        setTimeout(() => this.start(), 200);\\\\n      }\\\\n    };\\\\n    \\\\n    // Small delay then speak\\\\n    setTimeout(() => {\\\\n      if (this.synth) {\\\\n        this.synth.speak(utterance);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }, 50);\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  stopSpeaking(): void {\\\\n    if (this.synth) {\\\\n      this.synth.cancel();\\\\n    }\\\\n    if (this.state.audioState === 'SPEAKING') {\\\\n      this.updateState({ audioState: 'IDLE' });\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// Export singleton\\\\nexport const voiceBrain = VoiceBrainClass.getInstance();\\\\nexport default voiceBrain;\\\\nVBEOF\\\\n\\\\necho \\\\\\\"  \\\\u2705 VoiceBrain.ts\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n# AgenticBar.tsx - THE ONE UI COMPONENT\\\\n# \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\ncat function useVoice() {\\\\n  const [, forceUpdate] = useState(0);\\\\n  \\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    voiceBrain.init();\\\\n    return voiceBrain.subscribe(() => forceUpdate(x => x + 1));\\\\n  }, []);\\\\n\\\\n  const state = voiceBrain.getState();\\\\n  return {\\\\n    ...state,\\\\n    isListening: state.audioState === 'LISTENING',\\\\n    isSpeaking: state.audioState === 'SPEAKING',\\\\n    isPaused: state.audioState === 'PAUSED',\\\\n    isIdle: state.audioState === 'IDLE',\\\\n    start: () => voiceBrain.start(),\\\\n    stop: () => voiceBrain.stop(),\\\\n    pause: () => voiceBrain.pause(),\\\\n    resume: () => voiceBrain.resume(),\\\\n    speak: (text: string, onDone?: () => void) => voiceBrain.speak(text, onDone),\\\\n    stopSpeaking: () => voiceBrain.stopSpeaking(),\\\\n    setMode: (mode: VoiceMode) => voiceBrain.setMode(mode),\\\\n    setContext: (ctx: string) => voiceBrain.setContext(ctx)\\\\n  };\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// PROPS\\\\n// \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\ninterface AgenticBarProps {\\\\n  context?: string;\\\\n  hints?: string[];\\\\n  welcomeMessage?: string;\\\\n  autoStart?: boolean;\\\\n  showTypeInput?: boolean;\\\\n  onDigits?: (d: string) => void;\\\\n  onCommand?: (c: string) => void;\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\n// COMPONENT\\\\n// \\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\u2500\\\\nconst AgenticBar: React.FC<AgenticBarProps> = ({\\\\n  context,\\\\n  hints,\\\\n  welcomeMessage,\\\\n  autoStart = true,\\\\n  showTypeInput = true,\\\\n  onDigits: onDigitsProp,\\\\n  onCommand: onCommandProp\\\\n}) => {\\\\n  const voice = useVoice();\\\\n  const welcomeSpoken = useRef(false);\\\\n  const [textInput, setTextInput] = useState('');\\\\n  const [showModes, setShowModes] = useState(false);\\\\n\\\\n  // Register digit handler\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (onDigitsProp) {\\\\n      return voiceBrain.onDigits(onDigitsProp);\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [onDigitsProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Register command handler\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (onCommandProp) {\\\\n      return voiceBrain.onCommand(onCommandProp);\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [onCommandProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Set context\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (context) {\\\\n      voiceBrain.setContext(context);\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [context]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Welcome message + auto-start\\\\n  useEffect(() => {\\\\n    if (!welcomeSpoken.current) {\\\\n      welcomeSpoken.current = true;\\\\n      if (welcomeMessage) {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\\\n          voiceBrain.speak(welcomeMessage, () => {\\\\n            if (autoStart) {\\\\n              voiceBrain.start();\\\\n            }\\\\n          });\\\\n        }, 600);\\\\n      } else if (autoStart) {\\\\n        setTimeout(() => voiceBrain.start(), 500);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [welcomeMessage, autoStart]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Handle text input submit\\\\n  const handleTextSubmit = useCallback(() => {\\\\n    if (textInput.trim()) {\\\\n      const digits = extractDigits(textInput);\\\\n      if (digits && onDigitsProp) {\\\\n        onDigitsProp(digits);\\\\n      }\\\\n      if (onCommandProp) {\\\\n        onCommandProp(textInput.toLowerCase());\\\\n      }\\\\n      setTextInput('');\\\\n    }\\\\n  }, [textInput, onDigitsProp, onCommandProp]);\\\\n\\\\n  // Colors based on state\\\\n  const stateColors: Record<AudioState, string> = {\\\\n    'IDLE': '#666',\\\\n    'LISTENING': '#4CAF50',\\\\n    'SPEAKING': '#FFD700',\\\\n    'PAUSED': '#FF9800'\\\\n  };\\\\n\\\\n  const stateIcons: Record<AudioState, string> = {\\\\n    'IDLE': '\\\\u25a0',\\\\n    'LISTENING': '\\\\ud83c\\\\udfa4',\\\\n    'SPEAKING': '\\\\ud83d\\\\udd0a',\\\\n    'PAUSED': '\\\\u23f8\\\\ufe0f'\\\\n  };\\\\n\\\\n  const statusColor = stateColors[voice.audioState];\\\\n  const statusIcon = stateIcons[voice.audioState];\\\\n\\\\n  return (\\\\n    <div style={{\\\\n      margin: '16px 0 0',\\\\n      padding: '16px',\\\\n      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(${voice.isListening ? '76,175,80' : voice.isSpeaking ? '255,215,0' : '40,40,40'}, 0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.3))`,\\\\n      border: `2px solid ${statusColor}`,\\\\n      borderRadius: '16px'\\\\n    }}>\\\\n      {/* Status Row */}\\\\n      <div style={{ \\\\n        display: 'flex', \\\\n        alignItems: 'center', \\\\n        justifyContent: 'space-between', \\\\n        marginBottom: '12px' \\\\n      }}>\\\\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '12px' }}>\\\\n          <span style={{\\\\n            width: '16px',\\\\n            height: '16px',\\\\n            borderRadius: '50%',\\\\n            background: statusColor,\\\\n            boxShadow: (voice.isListening || voice.isSpeaking) ? `0 0 12px ${statusColor}` : 'none',\\\\n            animation: voice.isListening ? 'agenticPulse 1.5s infinite' : 'none'\\\\n          }} />\\\\n          <span style={{ color: statusColor, fontWeight: 700 }}>\\\\n            {statusIcon} {voice.audioState}\\\\n          </span>\\\\n          {context && (\\\\n            <span style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '0.85em' }}>\\\\u2022 {context}</span>\\\\n          )}\\\\n          <span style={{\\\\n            padding: '2px 8px',\\\\n            background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n            borderRadius: '10px',\\\\n            fontSize: '0.7em',\\\\n            color: '#aaa',\\\\n            textTransform: 'uppercase'\\\\n          }}>\\\\n            {voice.mode}\\\\n          </span>\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      </div>\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Buttons */}\\\\n      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '12px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>\\\\n        {/* Listen/Stop */}\\\\n        <button\\\\n          onClick={() => voice.isListening ? voice.stop() : voice.start()}\\\\n          style={{\\\\n            padding: '10px 16px',\\\\n            background: voice.isListening ? '#4CAF50' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n            color: voice.isListening ? '#fff' : '#aaa',\\\\n            border: voice.isListening ? 'none' : '1px solid #555',\\\\n            borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n            cursor: 'pointer',\\\\n            fontWeight: 600\\\\n          }}\\\\n        >\\\\n          \\\\ud83c\\\\udfa4 {voice.isListening ? 'Stop' : 'Listen'}\\\\n        </button>\\\\n\\\\n        {/* Speak Test */}\\\\n        <button\\\\n          onClick={() => voice.speak('Hello! I am Mr. V, your VistaView assistant.')}\\\\n          style={{\\\\n            padding: '10px 16px',\\\\n            background: voice.isSpeaking ? '#FFD700' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n            color: voice.isSpeaking ? '#000' : '#aaa',\\\\n            border: voice.isSpeaking ? 'none' : '1px solid #555',\\\\n            borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n            cursor: 'pointer',\\\\n            fontWeight: 600\\\\n          }}\\\\n        >\\\\n          \\\\ud83d\\\\udd0a Speak\\\\n        </button>\\\\n\\\\n        {/* Pause/Resume */}\\\\n        <button\\\\n          onClick={() => voice.isPaused ? voice.resume() : voice.pause()}\\\\n          style={{\\\\n            padding: '10px 16px',\\\\n            background: voice.isPaused ? '#FF9800' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n            color: voice.isPaused ? '#fff' : '#aaa',\\\\n            border: voice.isPaused ? 'none' : '1px solid #555',\\\\n            borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n            cursor: 'pointer',\\\\n            fontWeight: 600\\\\n          }}\\\\n        >\\\\n          {voice.isPaused ? '\\\\u25b6\\\\ufe0f Resume' : '\\\\u23f8\\\\ufe0f Pause'}\\\\n        </button>\\\\n\\\\n        {/* Mode Selector */}\\\\n        <div style={{ position: 'relative' }}>\\\\n          <button\\\\n            onClick={() => setShowModes(!showModes)}\\\\n            style={{\\\\n              padding: '10px 16px',\\\\n              background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n              color: '#aaa',\\\\n              border: '1px solid #555',\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n              cursor: 'pointer',\\\\n              fontWeight: 600\\\\n            }}\\\\n          >\\\\n            \\\\ud83d\\\\udcac Mode \\\\u25be\\\\n          </button>\\\\n          {showModes && (\\\\n            <div style={{\\\\n              position: 'absolute',\\\\n              bottom: '100%',\\\\n              left: 0,\\\\n              marginBottom: '8px',\\\\n              background: 'rgba(30,30,30,0.95)',\\\\n              border: '1px solid #555',\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n              padding: '8px',\\\\n              zIndex: 100\\\\n            }}>\\\\n              {(['interactive', 'talkative', 'text'] as VoiceMode[]).map(mode => (\\\\n                <button\\\\n                  key={mode}\\\\n                  onClick={() => { voice.setMode(mode); setShowModes(false); }}\\\\n                  style={{\\\\n                    display: 'block',\\\\n                    width: '100%',\\\\n                    padding: '8px 16px',\\\\n                    background: voice.mode === mode ? '#B8860B' : 'transparent',\\\\n                    color: voice.mode === mode ? '#000' : '#fff',\\\\n                    border: 'none',\\\\n                    borderRadius: '8px',\\\\n                    cursor: 'pointer',\\\\n                    textAlign: 'left',\\\\n                    marginBottom: '4px'\\\\n                  }}\\\\n                >\\\\n                  {mode === 'interactive' && '\\\\u26a1 Interactive'}\\\\n                  {mode === 'talkative' && '\\\\ud83d\\\\udcac Talkative'}\\\\n                  {mode === 'text' && '\\\\ud83d\\\\udcdd Text Only'}\\\\n                </button>\\\\n              ))}\\\\n            </div>\\\\n          )}\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      </div>\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Text Input */}\\\\n      {showTypeInput && (\\\\n        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>\\\\n          <input\\\\n            type=\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\"\\\\n            value={textInput}\\\\n            onChange={e => setTextInput(e.target.value)}\\\\n            onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && handleTextSubmit()}\\\\n            placeholder=\\\\\\\"Type here or speak...\\\\\\\"\\\\n            style={{\\\\n              flex: 1,\\\\n              padding: '12px 16px',\\\\n              background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\\\\n              border: '1px solid #555',\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n              color: '#fff',\\\\n              fontSize: '1em'\\\\n            }}\\\\n          />\\\\n          <button\\\\n            onClick={handleTextSubmit}\\\\n            disabled={!textInput.trim()}\\\\n            style={{\\\\n              padding: '12px 20px',\\\\n              background: textInput.trim() ? '#B8860B' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\\\\n              color: textInput.trim() ? '#000' : '#555',\\\\n              border: 'none',\\\\n              borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n              cursor: textInput.trim() ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',\\\\n              fontWeight: 700\\\\n            }}\\\\n          >\\\\n            Send\\\\n          </button>\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      )}\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Transcript */}\\\\n      {(voice.transcript || voice.interim) && (\\\\n        <div style={{\\\\n          marginBottom: '12px',\\\\n          padding: '12px',\\\\n          background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\\\\n          borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n          border: `1px solid ${voice.interim ? '#666' : '#4CAF50'}`\\\\n        }}>\\\\n          <div style={{\\\\n            fontSize: '0.7em',\\\\n            color: voice.interim ? '#888' : '#4CAF50',\\\\n            marginBottom: '4px',\\\\n            fontWeight: 600\\\\n          }}>\\\\n            {voice.interim ? '\\\\ud83c\\\\udfa4 HEARING...' : '\\\\u2713 HEARD'}\\\\n          </div>\\\\n          <div style={{\\\\n            color: '#fff',\\\\n            fontSize: '1.1em',\\\\n            fontStyle: voice.interim ? 'italic' : 'normal',\\\\n            opacity: voice.interim ? 0.7 : 1\\\\n          }}>\\\\n            \\\\\\\"{voice.interim || voice.transcript}\\\\\\\"\\\\n          </div>\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      )}\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Error */}\\\\n      {voice.error && (\\\\n        <div style={{\\\\n          marginBottom: '12px',\\\\n          padding: '12px',\\\\n          background: 'rgba(244,67,54,0.15)',\\\\n          border: '1px solid #f44336',\\\\n          borderRadius: '12px',\\\\n          color: '#f44336'\\\\n        }}>\\\\n          \\\\u26a0\\\\ufe0f {voice.error}\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      )}\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Hints */}\\\\n      {hints && hints.length > 0 && (\\\\n        <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: '0.8em', textAlign: 'center' }}>\\\\n          \\\\ud83d\\\\udca1 Try: {hints.join(' \\\\u2022 ')}\\\\n        </div>\\\\n      )}\\\\n\\\\n      {/* Animation Styles */}\\\\n      <style>{`\\\\n        @keyframes agenticPulse {\\\\n          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }\\\\n          50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1.1); }\\\\n        }\\\\n      `}</style>\\\\n    </div>\\\\n  );\\\\n};\\\\n\\\\nexport default AgenticBar;\\\\nABEOF\\\\n\\\\necho \\\\\\\"  \\\\u2705 AgenticBar.tsx\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n# VOICE BRAIN - SINGLETON\\\\\\\\n// One instance controls all voice for the entire app\\\\\\\\n// Based on proven working code from HTML test\\\\\\\\n// \\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\u2550\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type AudioState = 'IDLE' | 'LISTENING' | 'SPEAKING' | 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\nexport type VoiceMode = 'interactive' | 'talkative' | 'text';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Word to digit mapping - PROVEN WORKING\\\\\\\\nconst W2D: Record<string, string> = {\\\\\\\\n  'zero': '0', 'oh': '0', 'o': '0',\\\\\\\\n  'one': '1', 'won': '1',\\\\\\\\n  'two': '2', 'to': '2', 'too': '2',\\\\\\\\n  'three': '3', 'tree': '3',\\\\\\\\n  'four': '4', 'for': '4',\\\\\\\\n  'five': '5',\\\\\\\\n  'six': '6',\\\\\\\\n  'seven': '7',\\\\\\\\n  'eight': '8', 'ate': '8',\\\\\\\\n  'nine': '9', 'nein': '9'\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function extractDigits(text: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/);\\\\\\\\n  let digits = '';\\\\\\\\n  for (const w of words) {\\\\\\\\n    if (W2D[w]) digits += W2D[w];\\\\\\\\n    else if (/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d$/.test(w)) digits += w;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const raw = text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  return digits.length >= raw.length ? digits : raw;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function formatPhone(d: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const c = d.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '').slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 3) return c;\\\\\\\\n  if (c.length <= 6) return `${c.slice(0, 3)}-${c.slice(3)}`;\\\\\\\\n  return `${c.slice(0, 3)}-${c.slice(3, 6)}-${c.slice(6)}`;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface BrainState {\\\\\\\\n  audioState: AudioState;\\\\\\\\n  mode: VoiceMode;\\\\\\\\n  transcript: string;\\\\\\\\n  interim: string;\\\\\\\\n  context: string;\\\\\\\\n  error: string | null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype StateListener = (state: BrainState) => void;\\\\\\\\ntype DigitHandler = (digits: string) => void;\\\\\\\\ntype CommandHandler = (cmd: string) => void;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass VoiceBrainClass {\\\\\\\\n  private static instance: VoiceBrainClass;\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  private recognition: SpeechRecognition | null
